message:
fix(widgets): Respect apply_styling() in degradation paths

Bug fixes found during code review:

- Block: Don't apply style at EssentialOnly when apply_styling() is false
- ProgressBar: Check apply_styling() before set_style_area and gauge fill
  - At NoStyling, use '#' char instead of background color for visibility
- TextInput: Check apply_styling() before applying placeholder_style

These bugs would cause styling to be applied even when the budget
indicated NoStyling level or higher degradation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
